title: xiigen.i18n-translation.ref-stored.v1
description: Terminal event emitted by T668 TenantTranslationWriter after both the CAS blob (IPackageContentStoreService.store) and the lookup ref (F1523.storeRef) have been written. Ref docId follows the deterministic shape `${tenantId}::${moduleId}::${locale}` and is subject to CF-810 (tenantId = ALS at write time).

tenantId.description: Tenant that now owns the stored ref (ALS at write time — CF-810).

moduleId.description: Module slug the ref points at.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale of the stored translation.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 (64 lowercase hex) of the stored translation blob — retrieval key for IPackageContentStoreService.
